notes: Tier 11 (Blackwing Descent, The Bastion of Twilight & Throne of the Four Winds, Heroic) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins Cataclysm Classic Demonology Warlock gear guide. Tables on the source are identified by the raid names in their Source column (the page's own phase labels follow Blizzard's numbering, which differs from ours). The source combines Blizzard Phase 1 & 2 into a single T11 list (Phase 2 added no raid). Enchants and gems from the spec's Icy Veins enchants-consumables page.

enchants.name: Greater Inscription of Charged Lodestone — or Lesser Inscription of Charged Lodestone
Enchant Chest - Peerless Stats — or Enchant Chest - Mighty Stats
Enchant Gloves - Greater Mastery — or Enchant Gloves - Haste
Enchant Boots - Lavawalker — or Enchant Boots - Precision

gems.name: Brilliant Inferno Ruby — used in nearly all sockets; only match other colors for strong socket bonuses
